$description: Component tokens for Mobile Tab Item navigation component with multiple variants including default, leading icon, top icon, icon-only, trailing badge, and selected text. Supports default, active, and disabled states with optional border visibility. Figma Reference: Node ID 24-12525

$component.name: Tab Item
$component.description: A mobile navigation component that allows users to switch between related content groups. Supports text labels, icons (leading or top position), badges, and icon-only variants. Includes interaction states and optional bottom border indicator.
$component.structure: Container with optional bottom border, content area with icon (leading or top), text label, optional badge, with active/disabled states

sizes.sm: 24px height - Small size for compact mobile interfaces
sizes.md: 32px height - Medium size for standard mobile navigation
sizes.lg: 40px height - Large size for prominent mobile tabs
sizes.xl: 40px height - Extra large size (same as large)

variants.default: Standard tab with text label only
variants.leading-icon: Tab with icon positioned before text label
variants.top-icon: Tab with icon positioned above text label
variants.icon-only: Tab with icon only, no text label
variants.trailing-badge: Tab with badge indicator after text

usage.contexts: Mobile navigation bars, content switchers, filter tabs, section navigation, tabbed interfaces
usage.features: Icon positioning (leading/top), Badge indicators, Border visibility toggle, Active state indicator, Disabled state support

color.$comment: Color tokens for mobile tab item states - includes default, active, and disabled states

background.description: Mobile tab item default background - transparent - #FFFFFF00

border.description: Mobile tab item default border color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

text.description: Mobile tab item default text color - gray/500 - #667085

icon.description: Mobile tab item default icon color - gray/600 - #475467

background.description: Mobile tab item active background - transparent - #FFFFFF00

border.description: Mobile tab item active border color - primary/700 - #004eeb

text.description: Mobile tab item active text color - primary/700 - #004eeb

icon.description: Mobile tab item active icon color - primary/700 - #004eeb

background.description: Mobile tab item disabled background - transparent - #FFFFFF00

border.description: Mobile tab item disabled border color - gray/100 - #f2f4f7

text.description: Mobile tab item disabled text color - gray/400 - #98a2b3

icon.description: Mobile tab item disabled icon color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

border.$comment: Border tokens for mobile tab item - includes radius and width for active state indicator

radius.description: Mobile tab item border radius - none - 0px

default.description: Mobile tab item border width - lg - 4px

active.description: Mobile tab item active state bottom border width - lg - 4px

disabled.description: Mobile tab item border width - lg - 4px

padding.$comment: Spacing tokens for mobile tab item - horizontal and vertical padding

default.description: Mobile tab item horizontal padding for default variant - 8px
Mobile tab item vertical padding for default variant - 4xs - 4px

top.description: Mobile tab item top padding for top-icon variant - 4px

bottom.description: Mobile tab item bottom padding for top-icon variant - 8px

gap.description: Mobile tab item gap between icon and text - 4px

height.$comment: Size tokens for mobile tab item heights across different sizes

default.description: Mobile tab item height for default variant - 56px

icon-top.description: Mobile tab item height for icon-top variant - 64px

typography.$comment: Typography tokens for mobile tab item text across sizes and states

active.description: Mobile tab item active text typography - 14px semibold weight

default.description: Mobile tab item default text typography - 13px medium weight

disabled.description: Mobile tab item disabled text typography - 14px medium weight

badge.$comment: Badge size tokens for mobile tab item trailing badge variant

size.description: Mobile tab item badge size for default variant - 24px height
